'''dafana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wukongopterid|wukongopterid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wukongopterid|wukongopterid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dafana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæfænæth|dæfænæth]] || [[word:dæfænæj|dæfænæj]] || [[word:dæfænæsh|dæfænæsh]] || [[word:dæfænæ|dæfænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dafafanath|dafafanath]] || [[word:dafafanaj|dafafanaj]] || [[word:dafafanash|dafafanash]] || [[word:dafafana|dafafana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dafanath|dafanath]] || [[word:dafanaj|dafanaj]] || [[word:dafanash|dafanash]] || [[word:dafana|dafana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dafafnath|dafafnath]] || [[word:dafafnaj|dafafnaj]] || [[word:dafafnash|dafafnash]] || [[word:dafafnaf|dafafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dafanatha|dafanatha]] || [[word:dafanaja|dafanaja]] || [[word:dafanasha|dafanasha]] || [[word:dafanaka|dafanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dafanath|dafanath]] || [[word:dafanaj|dafanaj]] || [[word:dafanash|dafanash]] || [[word:dafana|dafana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dafanathal|dafanathal]] || [[word:dafanajal|dafanajal]] || [[word:dafanashal|dafanashal]] || [[word:dafanakal|dafanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dafanathatha|dafanathatha]] || [[word:dafanajaja|dafanajaja]] || [[word:dafanashasha|dafanashasha]] || [[word:dafanaka|dafanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dafanathan|dafanathan]] || [[word:dafanajan|dafanajan]] || [[word:dafanashan|dafanashan]] || [[word:dafanakan|dafanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dafanathaoro|dafanathaoro]] || [[word:dafanajaoro|dafanajaoro]] || [[word:dafanashaoro|dafanashaoro]] || [[word:dafanakaoro|dafanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
